\tzpentry{ID4576}{Coupling Constant Relation}
\paragraph{Canonical Statement.}
ID4576 introduces Coupling Constant Relation as a source-extracted canonical equation candidate. The equation is promoted from the Tier A equation-source intake and remains pending source-context expansion, duplicate review against the earlier TZPID corpus, Wolfram normalization, symbol-key enrichment, and derivation/proof-lane construction.
\paragraph{Canonical Equation.}
\begin{equation} T(t) = T_{\text{env}} \exp(-\alpha t) \implies T_{\text{bath}} \le 4.2 \text{ K} \end{equation}
